_doc.description: SD1.5 txt2img (ComfyUI API-format prompt graph) with an OPTIONAL IP-Adapter branch. POST this dict to /prompt. gen.py deep-copies it and overwrites values BY NODE ID (never by array index).

injection_points.reference_image_filename: node '12' -> inputs.image (LoadImage; must be a filename already present in ComfyUI/input, e.g. via comfyui.upload_image)

ip_adapter_wiring.on: When IP-Adapter is used, KSampler node '3' inputs.model MUST point to ['11', 0] (IPAdapterAdvanced output).
ip_adapter_wiring.off: When IP-Adapter is bypassed, gen.py sets KSampler node '3' inputs.model to ['4', 0] (raw checkpoint model) and deletes nodes '10', '11', '12'.

_doc.requires_custom_nodes: The IPAdapterUnifiedLoader / IPAdapterAdvanced nodes require the 'ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus' custom node (cubiq). If it is not installed, run with ip_adapter_weight<=0 so gen.py strips the branch and uses plain txt2img.

lora_injection.description: LoRAs are NOT in this static template; gen.py injects a LoraLoader chain at runtime when brief['loras'] is non-empty (see gen._inject_loras). Each LoraLoader is inserted right after the checkpoint and before its model/clip consumers.
lora_injection.checkpoint_node: node '4' (CheckpointLoaderSimple) is the model source ['4',0] and clip source ['4',1] that the first LoraLoader taps.
lora_injection.clip_consumers: nodes '6' and '7' (CLIPTextEncode positive/negative) read clip from ['4',1]; repointed to the last LoraLoader's clip output.
lora_injection.model_consumer: the model input currently reading ['4',0] is repointed to the last LoraLoader's model output. That is node '10' (IPAdapterUnifiedLoader) when the IP-Adapter branch is present, else node '3' (KSampler) after the branch is stripped.

_doc.notes: Node IDs are strings (ComfyUI API format). Links are [<node_id>, <output_index>] pairs.
